hero.title_start: Get a website that brings you more
hero.subtitle: I help businesses grow their online presence with simple, effective websites that turn visitors into customers.
hero.problem: Many websites get traffic but fail to turn visitors into real enquiries.

benefits.1: Attract more of the right visitors
benefits.4: Easy to use on any device

home.lead_driven_web_development_description: I build modern websites and web apps designed to do one thing: turn visitors into paying customers. Fast, responsive, and conversion-focused from day one.
home.website_optimization_upgrades_descriptio: If your site feels outdated or underperforming, I modernize it into a fast, credible system that builds trust and increases inquiries.
home.seo_performance_growth_description: Get found on Google and load faster than competitors. I improve rankings, speed, and structure so more customers actually discover you.
home.conversion_contact_systems_description: I set up smart contact forms, landing pages, and funnels that remove friction and turn traffic into real business inquiries.
home.how_it_works_description: A simple process to improve your website and turn it into a consistent source of leads.
home.step_01_title: You tell me what’s going on
home.step_01_description: We look at your current website, goals, and what’s stopping you from getting more leads.
home.step_02_description: I analyze your site, SEO, structure, and conversion flow to find what’s costing you customers.
home.step_03_description: Your website gets upgraded with better design, structure, speed, and conversion flow.
home.step_04_description: Your website becomes a system that attracts and converts visitors into real inquiries.
home.why_work_with_me_description: A focused approach to turning websites into consistent sources of leads.
home.why_work_with_me_paragraph_1: I help businesses improve their websites so they don’t just look good — they actually bring in customers.
home.why_work_with_me_paragraph_2: My focus is simple: better structure, better performance, and better conversion rates.
home.why_work_with_me_paragraph_3: The goal of every project is the same — more qualified inquiries through your website.
home.insights_title: Insights on building better websites & getting more customers
home.insights_description: Practical updates on web development, SEO, and improving conversion rates — based on real client work.

case_studies.title: Case Studies
case_studies.description: Explore Steven Software’s portfolio of web development projects, showcasing .NET, Vue, React, and more.

case_study.steven_1: I created this website to serve as a homebase for myself where I can share my thoughts and ideas and also display my projects and professional work.
case_study.steven_2: It is a complete full-stack project, featuring a proper deployment pipeline, hosting setup, APIs, web server, and custom domain.
case_study.steven_3: Website is hosted on my very own homelab which I maintain and develop.
case_study.gaming_1: This project was developed for a gaming association that I am a part of. Goal was to provide a platform for sharing tournaments, events, and news with members.
case_study.gaming_2: Facebook API was used to fully integrate medias, posts and events into the website.
case_study.gaming_3: Website was fully up and running on Azure but we lacked the funds to keep it online.

contact.title: Let’s build something that actually brings you customers
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you’re working on — I’ll respond with clear next steps, ideas, and what it would take to improve your website’s performance.
contact.message_label: What are you trying to improve?
contact.message_placeholder: Example: I want more leads from my website...
contact.footer_note: I’ll look at your website (or idea) and tell you exactly what’s blocking conversions.

footer.copyright: © {year} Steven Software. Proudly hosted on my own server.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I help you with
services.intro: I take websites that aren’t performing and turn them into systems that bring in steady leads and customers.
services.hero_title: Your website should bring you customers — not just exist
services.hero_description: Most websites look fine, but don’t actually convert visitors into inquiries. I fix that by improving clarity, trust, speed, and the path from visit to contact.
services.focus_1: Make your offer instantly clear within seconds
services.focus_2: Build trust through structure and modern design
services.focus_3: Improve speed so people don’t leave early
services.focus_4: Guide visitors naturally toward contacting you
services.card_1_desc: If your site feels outdated, confusing, or slow — I restructure and modernize it so it finally works for your business.
services.card_2_desc: I handle the technical side so your website loads quickly, runs smoothly, and doesn’t break when you need it most.
services.card_3_desc: From fixes to new pages, I help you improve your website step by step — without unnecessary complexity.
services.how_description: A simple process to understand your website and turn it into something that brings in more customers.
services.step_1_title: 1. You tell me what’s going on
services.step_1_sub: We look at your current website, goals, and what feels like it’s not working.
services.step_1_b1: What your website is supposed to achieve
services.step_1_b3: What success looks like for you
services.step_2_title: 2. I find what’s holding you back
services.step_2_sub: I review your site and identify what’s stopping visitors from becoming customers.
services.step_2_b1: Clarity of your message and offer
services.step_2_b2: How easy it is to contact you
services.step_3_sub: Changes are made to make your website clearer, faster, and more effective.
services.step_4_sub: Your website starts working as a system that attracts and converts visitors.
services.step_4_b1: More people understand what you offer
